chunks.title: Israel's Oppression under Jabin
chunks.reason: Establishes the historical context of Israel's sin and oppression by King Jabin and Sisera.

chunks.title: Deborah Summons Barak
chunks.reason: Introduces Deborah as judge and records the dialogue where she calls Barak to battle.

chunks.title: Mobilization of Forces
chunks.reason: Describes the gathering of troops and Sisera's response to the threat.

chunks.title: The Battle at Mount Tabor
chunks.reason: Depicts the divine intervention and military victory over Sisera's army.

chunks.title: Death of Sisera by Jael
chunks.reason: Narrates the flight of Sisera and his assassination by Jael in her tent.

chunks.title: Final Subjugation of Canaan
chunks.reason: Concludes the account with the total defeat of King Jabin.
